title: Login page not loading
description: The login page throws a 404 error when accessed from mobile browsers.

title: Payment gateway failure
description: Customers are unable to complete checkout due to payment gateway timeout.

title: Profile picture not uploading
description: Users get an error when trying to upload a profile picture larger than 1MB.

title: Email notifications not sending
description: Order confirmation emails are not being delivered to customers.

title: Dashboard charts not rendering
description: The analytics dashboard shows blank charts on Safari browser.

title: Password reset link expired
description: The password reset link expires too quickly, within 2 minutes of generation.

title: Search bar returning wrong results
description: Product search returns unrelated items when special characters are used.

title: Invoice PDF download broken
description: Clicking the download invoice button results in a corrupted PDF file.

title: App crashing on logout
description: The mobile app crashes unexpectedly when the user taps the logout button.

title: Dark mode not saving preference
description: Dark mode resets to light mode every time the user refreshes the page.

title: Cart items disappearing
description: Items added to the cart are removed after the user navigates to another page.

title: Two-factor authentication not working
description: OTP codes sent via SMS are not being accepted during the login process.

title: Subscription plan not upgrading
description: After payment, the user's account is not upgraded to the premium plan.
